title: Export project code as downloadable archive

requirements.text: Generate a complete downloadable archive containing all project source code, including frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Motoko), configuration files, and project metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive includes all frontend source files from the frontend directory
Archive includes all backend source files (main.mo and any other .mo files)
Archive includes configuration files (package.json, tailwind.config.js, etc.)
Archive is provided in a standard compressed format (zip or tar.gz)
User can download the archive through the interface or receive a download link

constraints: Do not modify any existing functionality while preparing the export
Include all necessary files for the project to be reconstructed elsewhere
Preserve the existing directory structure in the archive
nonGoals: Setting up local development instructions or documentation
Creating a migration path to other platforms
